title: Apiary Worker Report
description: Schema for a full worker report from an Apiary worker run, kept separate from the run ledger.

runId.description: Unique identifier for the overall run, typically a UUID or timestamp-prefixed ID.

workerId.description: Unique identifier for the worker instance (e.g., hostname, pod name, or UUID).

doing.description: What the worker was doing at the start of this report period.

accomplished.description: List of accomplishments or completed tasks for this period.

findings.description: Key findings, observations, or discoveries made during work.

artifacts.description: Artifacts produced or consumed by this worker.

label.description: Human-friendly name or description of the artifact.

path.description: Relative or absolute file path to the artifact.

kind.description: Type/category of artifact (e.g., report, log, data, binary, config).

filesTouched.description: List of file paths that were read, modified, or created by the worker.

nextSteps.description: Planned next actions or follow-ups for this worker.

risks.description: Identified risks, blockers, or concerns that require attention.

updatedAt.description: When this report was last modified (ISO 8601).
